semantic_description: The target function performs insertion sort in place on an integer array a of length n. The input contract provides ownership of the full array and bounds 0 <= n <= 2000; the postcondition requires the final array contents to be sorted_z and a Permutation of the original logical list. The implementation uses an outer for loop over i from 1 to n - 1 and an inner while loop that shifts larger elements one slot to the right before writing key at j + 1. Boundary behavior includes zero- and one-element arrays where the outer loop is skipped; all memory updates are in-place writes to the same array.
